hook.text: SCOTLAND ROBBED AS MCTOMINAY DENIED PENALTY

beats.text: MOROCCO STUN SCOTLAND WITH A GOAL AFTER 70 SECONDS
VAR STAYS SILENT AS MCTOMINAY PENALTY IS WAVED AWAY
KEANE SAYS MCTOMINAY WAS LOOKING TO GO DOWN
SCOTLAND MUST NOW BEAT HAITI TO STAY IN THE WC

caption: The moment that had Scotland fuming 🔴 Morocco opened the scoring through Ismael Saibari after just 70 seconds — then Scott McTominay went down in the box under a clear challenge. The referee waved it away. VAR? Silent. Former official Christina Unkel called it 'a very clear penalty', but Roy Keane controversially dismissed the appeal, claiming McTominay was 'looking to go down'. Scotland couldn't muster a single shot on target and now face must-win games to keep their World Cup alive. Was that a penalty? 👇 #mufc #manutd #football #matchday #worldcup #scotland #mctominay
